reference: Though you might be protected from pregnancy, there is a small risk of becoming pregnant since you took the pill twelve hours late. Usually in such situations, it is wise to avoid sexual intercourse for two days after a missed pill, or a condom should have been used by your partner. To eliminate any chances of pregnancy in the future, I suggest that you take emergency contraceptive pills if you had sexual intercourse.
text: Though you might be protected from pregnancy, there is a small risk of becoming pregnant since you took the pill twelve hours late. Usually in such situations, it is wise to avoid sexual intercourse for two days after a missed pill, or a condom should have been used by your partner. To eliminate any chances of pregnancy in the future, I suggest that you take emergency contraceptive pills if you had sexual intercourse.
